steps.title: Find the five face areas
steps.content: The box is a cube without a lid, so it has $5$ exterior square faces. Each square face has area $$52\cdot 52=2{,}704$$ square centimeters.

steps.title: Convert to square meters
steps.content: Multiply by the $5$ faces, then convert from square centimeters to square meters: $$5(2{,}704)=13{,}520$$ $$13{,}520\div 10{,}000=1.352$$ The answer is 1.352.
